company_business: AI-powered Odoo ERP for UAE construction and contracting firms, combining project-cost control, finance compliance, and fixed-scope rollout.
conversation_purpose: Book a scoping call with Finance/CFO, project controls, and operations.
key_pains: BoQ vs actual cost visibility is delayed
Retention, progress billing, and subcontractor settlements are manual
Project profitability is unclear until too late
Site, procurement, and finance teams operate in silos
VAT and Corporate Tax readiness is inconsistent across projects
discovery_questions: How often do you get real-time cost variance per project?
How are retention and progress billings currently managed?
Where do delays happen between site updates and finance posting?
How do you monitor subcontractor liabilities and cashflow risk?
Can your team produce audit-ready supporting records on demand?

objection_handlers.objection: Our process is unique; ERP will not fit.
objection_handlers.response: That is exactly why we use phased configuration and operator-led mapping. We do not force template-only rollout; we adapt workflows while keeping governance and compliance intact.
We run controlled phased deployment with parallel operations where needed, so project delivery continues while systems are modernized.
Understood. Delaying still carries project leakage and visibility cost. A scoping call now gives you a decision-ready roadmap without commitment.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.best_for: Small contractors with core finance and project basics

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.best_for: Large contractors with advanced integrations and BI

industry_modules: Procurement and inventory linked to projects
Finance core with AP/AR, GL, fixed assets, cashflow
integrations: API integrations with external procurement/tender systems
